hero.description: Explore a selection of projects we've designed and developed for businesses across different industries.

yeniAy.title: Yeni Ay Aluminum
yeniAy.description: Modern website for an aluminum company in Cyprus.
yeniAy.detailsDescription: A fully developed corporate website for Yeni Ay Aluminum, a leading aluminum solutions company in Cyprus. The site showcases their product range, services, and company values with a clean and professional design built for trust and conversions.

arcDental.title: Arc Dental Clinic
arcDental.description: Professional website for a dental clinic focused on patient trust and care.
arcDental.detailsDescription: A modern, patient-focused website for Arc Dental Clinic. Designed to build trust from the first visit, featuring service pages, team profiles, and an appointment booking flow. Built with a clean aesthetic that reflects the clinic's commitment to quality care.

arcCoffee.title: Arc Coffee Shop
arcCoffee.description: Elegant website for a coffee shop.
arcCoffee.detailsDescription: A warm and inviting website for Arc Coffee, designed to reflect the cozy atmosphere of the brand. Features the menu, story, and location in a visually rich layout that drives foot traffic and online engagement.

menex.title: Menex Digital Menus
menex.description: SaaS software that provides digital QR code menus for restaurants.
menex.detailsDescription: Menex is a SaaS platform that provides restaurants with dynamic digital menus accessible via QR code. The system includes a dashboard for menu management, real-time updates, multi-language support, and analytics — eliminating the need for printed menus.

coffee.title: Coffee Shop
coffee.description: Elegant website for a coffee shop.
coffee.detailsDescription: A beautifully crafted website for a local coffee shop, designed to capture the brand's warm personality. The site features the menu, ambiance photography, and location details in a layout optimized for mobile visitors.

northEstate.title: NorthWay Real Estate
northEstate.description: Real estate website with advanced property listings.
northEstate.detailsDescription: A full-featured real estate website for NorthWay, enabling property browsing with filters, detailed listing pages, and a contact flow for inquiries. Built to handle a large inventory of properties while keeping the user experience fast and intuitive.

luxora.title: Luxora
luxora.description: E-commerce design for a furniture brand with a clean shopping experience.
luxora.detailsDescription: A premium e-commerce UI/UX design for Luxora, a furniture brand targeting a high-end market. The design focuses on large product visuals, refined typography, and a seamless shopping flow that reflects the brand's luxury positioning.

northWnd.title: NorthWnd Clothing
northWnd.description: E-commerce design for a clothing store with product catalog.
northWnd.detailsDescription: A clean and modern e-commerce design for NorthWnd, a contemporary clothing brand. The UI covers product listing pages, filters, product detail pages, cart, and checkout — designed with a minimal aesthetic that keeps the focus on the products.

pageturner.title: Pageturner Bookstore
pageturner.detailsDescription: An inviting e-commerce design for Pageturner, an online bookstore. The design features a clean catalog layout, book detail pages with reviews, genre filtering, and a checkout flow — all crafted to make book discovery enjoyable.

urbane.title: Urbane Clothes
urbane.description: Elegant e-commerce design for an urban clothing brand.
urbane.detailsDescription: A bold and contemporary e-commerce design for Urbane, an urban streetwear brand. The design system includes a dark-toned product catalog, lookbook-style layouts, and a streamlined checkout experience that matches the brand's attitude.

driveManage.title: DriveManage
driveManage.description: Car rental management system design for reservations, vehicles, and reports.
driveManage.detailsDescription: A comprehensive UI design for DriveManage, a car rental management system. The dashboard covers reservations, vehicle tracking, customer management, and revenue reporting — all accessible from a single clean interface designed for operational efficiency.

hrManage.title: HRManage
hrManage.description: HR management system design for workforce, payroll, and attendance.
hrManage.detailsDescription: A full-featured UI design for HRManage, an HR management platform. The system covers employee records, attendance tracking, leave management, payroll, and performance — designed with a clean layout that makes complex HR workflows simple and intuitive.

salesHub.title: SalesHub
salesHub.description: CRM and sales management system design for leads, deals, and revenue.
salesHub.detailsDescription: A modern CRM UI design for SalesHub, built to help sales teams manage leads, track deals, and grow revenue. Features a sales pipeline view, revenue overview charts, lead source analytics, and recent activity tracking in a clean dashboard layout.

stockFlow.title: StockFlow
stockFlow.description: Inventory and stock management system design with alerts and reporting.
stockFlow.detailsDescription: A clean and functional UI design for StockFlow, a smart inventory management system. The dashboard provides a real-time overview of stock levels, low stock alerts, supplier management, and inventory analytics — designed for businesses that need to stay on top of their stock.

seo.title: Web Design Portfolio — ArcStack North Cyprus
seo.description: Browse ArcStack's portfolio of websites, ecommerce stores, and business systems built for clients across North Cyprus, Cyprus, and Turkey.
